item.title: Version 0.2.1
item.description: - Polished the single-window Settings layout with tighter top-column balancing, clearer section hierarchy, compact permissions rows, and action-table sizing tweaks that remove truncation in common controls. - Cleaned up update messaging in Settings by showing the short version only and mapping Sparkle "no update found" and cancelled checks to user-friendly status text. - Restricted duplicate-instance termination to Debug builds so release builds no longer interfere with Sparkle relaunch/update flows.
